commitMessage: Fix tracker heartbeat snapshot pipeline so /tracker shows real data after full snapshot.

uploadProofSamples.heartbeat: [fishit-tracker] upload_proof stage=heartbeat usernameKey=priadivine424 discordOwnerId=441501969769693185 payloadType=tracker_status phase=player_data_selected build=UPLOAD_COMPACT_FAST_PATH_2026_06_13 hasLeaderstatsSnapshot=0 hasFishSnapshot=0 hasStoneSnapshot=0 snapshotComplete=0 inventoryReady=0 accepted=1 rejectReason=none ownerBinding=registered_account_match
uploadProofSamples.inventory_snapshot_success: [fishit-tracker] upload_proof stage=inventory_snapshot usernameKey=stokjualanardian discordOwnerId=1444588274327752870 payloadType=inventory_snapshot phase=live build=UPLOAD_COMPACT_FAST_PATH_2026_06_13 hasLeaderstatsSnapshot=1 hasFishSnapshot=1 hasStoneSnapshot=1 snapshotComplete=1 inventoryReady=1 accepted=1 rejectReason=none ownerBinding=registered_account_match

notes: ownerBinding value is registered_account_match (not literal resolved) when Discord owner is resolved from registered tracked accounts
Many live inventory_snapshot uploads still show snapshotComplete=0 when scan proof is partial; full success requires all proof flags + completeness evaluation
